name: stat-card
description: A single-metric KPI display card: prominent label + value + optional trend indicator (direction + delta magnitude) + leading/trailing/footer slots + optional whole-card link. Purely presentational PARTIAL; the server pre-formats the value. Variant drives a left-border accent colour; size drives the value font prominence (sm=2xl, md=3xl, lg=4xl). No enhancer, no client state.
docs: Copies the stat-card partial to your JTE root at lievit/stat-card.jte, reached as @template.lievit.stat-card(title="Nuovi contatti", value="284"). Params: title (required), value (required, pre-formatted by controller), prefix/suffix for inline unit symbols, trend (up|down|neutral|none) + trendValue for the delta annotation, variant (default|info|success|warning|destructive) for a left-border accent, size (sm|md|lg) for typographic prominence, href to make the whole card a navigable link, loading=true for the skeleton state, and three content slots (leading, trailing, footer). Wire HTMX refresh via the attrs channel (trusted raw, static strings only). NOTE: --lv-text-4xl (used by size=lg) must be defined in your token file; it is not present in the base lievit-tokens.css as of v-next wave 1.
